text.title: AI Spatial Computing UX Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the ai-spatial-computing methodology.

example.title: Vision Pro recipe coach
example.narrative: Hands-free cooking assistant on Vision Pro. Gaze opens recipe card, voice triggers step advance, gesture confirms timer. Latency budget: gaze 80ms, voice 120ms, render 50ms (250ms total). Safety: 15-min seated-mode break suggestion; voice-only fallback when hands wet.
example.artifact: spatial-ux-spec.md describing modality matrix + safety policy + latency budget.
